ci_status_line: Issue #2163 - URL truncation header bug - PR open
title: Anytype (2nd)
claim: URL menu actions in the featured-relations header could surface the truncated display string. Tightened the data-flow contract.
body: Real fix for anyproto/anytype-ts #2163. The URL / Email / Phone relation menu (Go / Copy / Reload) was reading its value from `childRef.current.getValue()`, which returns whatever the child cell exposes. In the featured-relations header the cell is rendered with `shortUrl=true` and `textLimit=150`, so the visible string can be a truncated form like `github.com/an...issues`. The underlying record value is the full `https://github.com/anyproto/anytype-ts/issues`. Even where the current text-cell implementation does not propagate truncation back through `getValue()`, the contract left the door open. The fix reads `record[relation.relationKey]` directly: the record value is authoritative for URL targets, the child cell is purely a display surface. Second PR to Anytype, 24h after the first one merged.
